## Summary
Describe the user-facing or engineering outcome of this PR.

## Validation
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m src.pipeline.run_pipeline --start-date 2025-12-01 --days 1 --rows-per-day 100`
- [ ] Updated docs or screenshots if behavior changed

## Checklist
- [ ] Data model changes are reflected in SQL, tests, and docs
- [ ] Backward-compatibility or migration risks were considered
- [ ] CI should pass without manual setup
